implementation.ui: Added OAuth Final Recovery panel at /admin/pinterest-health with 'Reconnect with Full Pinterest Access' button and scope verification grid.
flow: 1. Click → POST pinterest-oauth-start with extra_scopes=ALL Pinterest Business scopes + auto_sync_catalog=true
2. Pinterest authorization screen requests every supported scope
3. pinterest-oauth-callback exchanges code, stores token, validates /user_account + /boards, auto-registers catalog feed
5. Final recovery runs Guardian Sentinel + Recovery Orchestrator, verifies scopes, computes trust
6. If GREEN: app_config.pinterest_publishing_global_stop=false, pcie2_publish_enabled=true, Week 1 ramp (3 premium pins/day) armed

high: User: click 'Reconnect with Full Pinterest Access' at /admin/pinterest-health and grant ALL requested scopes
medium: Monitor impressions, outbound clicks, saves, and trust score during Week 1 ramp
low: Promote to Week 2 ramp (5/day) once trust_score >= 70 sustained for 7 days
